title: Fix sse.routes.ts write-after-end race
description: src/routes/sse.routes.ts:38-43 initial connection message writes to res; line 64 may call res.end() then more writes happen — throws ERR_STREAM_WRITE_AFTER_END. Fix: wrap res.write in try/catch, or set a flag after end().
validation: Read sse.routes.ts. Confirm res.write wrapped in try/catch or flag-guarded.
